name: Asparagus Mornay (March 1991)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the asparagus and cook for 6-10 minutes in water. Add salt.
2. Drain carefully, not to break tips.
3. Roll one asparagus spear in each slice of ham.
4. Place rolls in a buttered baking dish. Set aside.
5. Melt butter and cook chopped onion until soft. Add flour to make a roux about 2 minutes. Let it cool slightly.
6. Bring mixture back to heat and stir in milk until thickened. Add cream, stir, and let cook for 5 minutes.
7. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
8. Remove from heat and add egg yolk, stirring well.
9. Stir in grated Swiss cheese.
10. Spoon sauce over asparagus rolls and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake for 20 minutes.
